Name: 200A Main Breaker
Description: Provide and install new CH main breaker kit to existing main lug panel. Remove line side feeders from panel lugs. Remove panel lugs and install 200a main breaker into load center. Torque all bolts and nuts to specifications. Install feeders into main breaker. Provide new 42 circuit flush mount panel cover and install.

Name: 200A Meter Enclosure
Description: Remove old existing meter base enclosure. Install new meter enclosure. Includes new conduit bushings, service wire, and NOLOX if required for AL conductors.

Name: 200A Panel Enclosure
Description: Replace electrical panel. Identify existing circuits in panel. Remove old electrical panel. Install new 200a main breaker, flush mount, indoor, 42 circuit panel. Clean up and re-terminate all existing circuits. Install new feeder wires coming from meter. Complete install will be executed to city code and/or NEC.

Name: Arc Fault Breaker Upgrade
Description: Determine wire size. Provide and install new 15a or 20a arc-fault breaker (determined by wire size and circuit ampacity requirements). Install branch circuit grounded conductor in breaker neutral lug. Install branch circuit un-grounded conductor on breaker power lug. Switch breaker “on” and check for any trouble codes. Verify correct operation of circuit after repair.

Name: Custom Job
Description: Pro will provide you a quote if the work you need does not fit into one of our standard categories.

Name: Grounding and Bonding
Description: Install 2- 8' ground rods within 6' of panel and within 6' of each other. install acorns and #4 awg bare ground wire from new ground rods to panel. Install new intersystem bond. Install new #4 awg bare ground wire from panel ground bar to cold water ground. Includes up to 50' of wire for cold water ground.

Name: Install Meter Slip Joint
Description: 2” PVC underground riser to meter base has pulled out of meter base due to ground settling. Disconnect power to house, remove electrical meter, remove load side wiring to meter, remove wiring from meter base, cut back pvc, install new slip joint and re install wires and meter base.

Name: Install New 60A Sub Panel
Description: Install new 12 space 60 amp main lug sub panel fed from main panel. Separate neutrals and grounds, install #6 feeders, bond enclosure, and install up to 4 single pole breakers or 2 double pole breakers. Installed to NEC and city ordinances.

Name: Install New Overhead Service Riser
Description: Build new service riser for 200a service. Install new myers hub, 2 rigid conduit, straps,  weatherhead, wire hanger, 2/0 copper THHN, and polaris taps. Insludes new riser from weatherhead to meter base. Does not include new meter base.

Name: Install Wire Grommets (Up To 4)
Description: Upon inspection, found multiple wires missing protection from panel enclosures. Remove wiring from terminals, strip back to code compliant length, install new plastic grommets on cable assembly and re-terminate wiring. Up to 4 cables.

Name: Relocate Panel (11'-25')
Description: Relocate panel from existing location to new NEC approved location. Use existing panel enclosure to make joints with circuits and extend circuits to new location. Run new feeder wires from meter can to new panel location for  200A service. If panel is not being relocated outside, a main disconnect may be required to bring up to code.

Name: Service Disconnect
Description: Install new 200A service disconnect outside of house for emergency service disconnect. Complys with NEC code 230.82(3) requiring Emergency Disconnect to be labeled and readily accessible from outside of house. 2/0 wire from meter to disconnect and from disconnect to panel. Includes bonding disconnect can.

Name: Upgrade 200a service to 400a(underground)
Description: Remove existing 200a meter base, line and load wires. Determine appropriate spot for new 400a service. Install new 400a meter base fed from underground. Install all new service entrance wires for all equipment.

Name: WAP Installation - Commercial (Device Included)
Description: Supply and install wireless access point in commercial space, device included

Name: Commercial Service Fee
Description: Standard service fee for technician arriving at commercial location

Name: Credit Card Fee
Description: 1.5 Credit Card Fee

Name: Emergency Service Fee
Description: Emergency service fee for technician to arrive on location after hours or on weekends.

Name: Job Walk-
Description: Arrive on job and discuss job details with customer. Note any needed details and discuss options and pricing with customer to complete project.

Name: Job Walk- Recessed Lighting
Description: Inspect house for addition of recessed lighting. Customer requests estimate to add recessed lighting. Confirm placement, layout, fixture style, switch addition and attic access.

Name: Out Of Service Area Service Fee
Description: Standard price for technician to arrive at location outside of our normal service area

Name: Service Fee
Description: Standard service fee for technician arriving at location

Name: Troubleshoot Level 1
Description: Troubleshoot problem pertaining to 1 circuit or appliance

Name: Troubleshoot Level 2
Description: Troubleshoot problem pertaining to multiple circuits or multiple appliances

Name: Replace GFCI Receptacle
Description: Replace non-working GFCI with new GFCI. Includes new in-use cover for outdoor applications.

Name: Add New Receptacle
Description: Add new receptacle from existing circuit less than 15' away. Run new cable, install box, terminate new receptacle and install cover plate.

Name: Add New Switch and Fixture
Description: Cut in box for switch. Install new single gang box, run cable from existing power location, and run new cable from new switch box to new fixture location. Cut in hole for new wafer light and install wafer light. Includes 15' of switchleg cable and 15' of power cable, and wafer light fixture.

Name: Add Receptacle By Penetrating Outside From Interior Receptacle
Description: Find existing receptacle inside on exterior wall. Remove cover plate, receptacle, and box. Penetrate to the outside through brick or siding using long drill bit. Set box on outside where penetration occurred. Install receptacle and in use cover.

Name: Assembly of Light Fixture
Description: Remove light fixture from packaging. Remove all glass globes, chains, bulbs and any other accessories. Read instructions and assemble fixture per manufacturer specifications. Only used for assembly of light fixtures where the assembly process is more than “standard” assembly.

Name: Attic Open Splice Repair
Description: Locate and verify all connections in open splice are solid connections. Install new open splice box to bring up to code.

Name: Ceiling Fan (Over 12' Ceiling)
Description: Demo and removal of existing ceiling fan. Installation of new owner purchased ceiling fan in same location. Over to 12' ceilings

Name: Ceiling Fan (Up To 12' Ceiling)
Description: Demo and removal of existing ceiling fan. Installation of new owner purchased ceiling fan in same location. Up to 12' ceilings

Name: Chandelier Crystal Installation
Description: Remove fixture from packaging. Remove gloves and use gloves to unpack all crystals from packaging. Check all crystals for damage before installing. Install all crystals per manufacturer instructions.

Name: Dig Trench In Soft Ground, per ft
Description: Did new trench in soft dirt, no rocks or limestone. Trench to be dug up to 18” to top of conduit. Hang dig around all lines. Call 811 prior to dig for dig test.

Name: Fan and Light Separation and Rewire - Bedroom
Description: Rewire existing ceiling fan/light to allow separate wall control of fan and light. Includes new 14/3 wiring, 2-gang box, switches, plate, installation, and testing.

Name: Front Smart Video Doorbell Install - Google Nest
Description: Furnish and install Google Nest video doorbell system at front entry. Includes new low-voltage wiring, transformer, chime integration, full setup, testing, and customer app connection.

Name: GFCI/AFCI Breaker
Description: Remove old GFCI/AFCI breaker (if applicable), and install new GFCI/AFCI breaker. Included is 15 or 20 amp single pole breaker.

Name: Hang Flat Panel TV (In-Wall Wiring)
Description: Install owner purchased mounting bracket for flat screen TV. Install low voltage HDMI/component wire chase and hidden electrical receptacle. (existing power located within 15' of new receptacle)

Name: Hang Flat Panel TV (No Wiring/<55)
Description: Unbox owner provided TV wall mount. Verify mount is compatible with TV size and weight. Determine mounting position and height with owner. Locate 2x4 studs in wall and pre-drill holes for wood lags. Hang and level TV mount and secure with wood lags. Install brackets on TV and hang TV on wall mount. Adjust accordingly and verify TV is level.

Name: Hang Flat Panel TV (No Wiring/>55)
Description: Unbox owner provided TV wall mount. Verify mount is compatible with TV size and weight. Determine mounting position and height with owner. Locate 2x4 studs in wall and pre-drill holes for wood lags. Hang and level TV mount and secure with wood lags. Install brackets on TV and hang TV on wall mount. Adjust accordingly and verify TV is level.

Name: In-use Cover
Description: Remove existing faceplate/cover on existing receptacle. Remove receptacle and check for damage. Re-install receptacle and install new in-use bubble cover. Check for correct operation after repair.

Name: Install 100 amp disconnect
Description: mounting 100a non fusible disconnect in desired location , running conduit/cable from the panel (line) and to the unit (load), and connecting hot wires to the lugs and grounds to the ground bar. Includes 100a disconnect and material for a 5ft whip to equipment

Name: Install 18 SEER Mini Split
Description: Upgrade your comfort with an energy-efficient 18 SEER mini split installation. This system provides quiet, reliable heating and cooling, improved indoor air quality, and lower energy bills—ideal for any room needing precise temperature control. Includes mini split system, all necessary parts and labor to install, freon, electrical disconnect, wire and breaker in panel. Includes electrical install up to 30' from existing electrical panel.

Name: Install 24 x 24 x 12 in. NEMA 4X Metal Electric Enclosure IP66 Water Dust Resistant
Description: Install outdoor rated box on any type of wall including siding, brick, wood or stone.

Name: Install 50a Spa Disconnect (50'-100')
Description: Install new 50a 240v spa disconnect outside. Includes new 50a 2 pole breaker, 6/3 Romex from panel, into attic, through attic and penetrate outside soffit. Install conduit from soffit down to 50a Spa disconnect outside. Run seal tite from spa disconnect to spa electrical panel. Includes penetration of spa siding for seal tite to enter. Terminate spa and check power. Includes running power with no more than 100' of cabling. Before work is started, technician will verify existing electrical panel and service has space and can handle the spa power requirements.

Name: Install AC Soft Starter (Customer Provided)
Description: Retrieve soft starter provided by homeowner. Un-box and check for proper compatibility with homeowners AC unit. Disconnect power to unit, install soft starter in AC unit. Bundle wires neatly and zip tie wires to unit so vibrations from unit do not cause future wire damage. Re-establish power to AC unit and check for proper operation.

Name: Install Al To CU Pigtails With New Receptacles
Description: Remove existing receptacles, remove AL wires from existing receptacle. Prepare 3- 6 cut pieces of solid CU THHN. Strip and pre-twist AL to CU wires and install 3- Alumicons to tighten and secure connection. Strip, loop, and land new CU wires onto side terminal posts on the existing receptacle. Secure receptacle to existing box

Name: Install Ballast Bypass LED Tubes (Up To 2 Lamps)
Description: Remove fluorescent tubes, remove cover, cut and remove existing ballast. Discard of ballast. Re-wire fixture for line voltage LED tubes. Install new LED tubes in fixture and test.

Name: Install Ballast Bypass LED Tubes (Up To 4 Lamps)
Description: Remove fluorescent tubes, remove cover, cut and remove existing ballast. Discard of ballast. Re-wire fixture for line voltage LED tubes. Install new LED tubes in fixture and test.

Name: Install Conduit (1.25-2), per ft
Description: Install conduit for electrical cabling raceway. Includes installation of PVC schedule 40 or 80, EMT, flexible non-metallic, and flexible metallic conduits. Includes connectors, couplings, supports, straps, securing and aligning all conduit to NEC specifications.

Name: Install Conduit (1/2-1), per ft
Description: Install conduit for electrical cabling raceway. Includes installation of PVC schedule 40 or 80, EMT, flexible non-metallic, and flexible metallic conduits. Includes connectors, couplings, supports, straps, securing and aligning all conduit to NEC specifications.

Name: Install Dimmer Switch (Decora or Toggle)
Description: Remove old switch, install new single pole or 3-way dinner for lighting control. Verify bulbs are dimmable. Does not include changing bulbs. Good for 600 watts.

Name: Install Dryer Plug
Description: Removal of existing Receptacle if needed, check wiring and amperage. Install applicable receptacle style for dryer plug specified by home owner

Name: Install EV Car Charger (Stud Cavity Next To Panel)
Description: Install 50a car charger next to panel. Includes install new 50a breaker, run 6/3 romex from panel to next stud space, install 2 gang cut in box. install all grommets and strapping per required by NEC, and terminate EV rated 14-50R and install cover plate or mount and direct wire car charger over 2 gang box.

Name: Install Fence Light
Description: Run new low voltage wire from transformer in trench underground to fence. Run wire along backside of fence and staple to secure to fence. Drill hole in fence post at desired light location. Install company provided fence light on fence and terminate low voltage wiring with outdoor rated connections. Test for proper operation after install.

Name: Install GFCI
Description: Remove old duplex receptacle and replace with new company provided GFCI or install new company provided GFCI to new added receptacle box.

Name: Install Keypad Pole and Keypad
Description: Dig hole in desired location of keypad. Install pole and fill with concrete to set in place. Install keypad on pole and link to gate opener.

Name: Install LED Flat Panel
Description: Demo existing fixture, install and mount new led light fixture. Make sure lights are operating properly.

Name: Install New 15/20a Circuit (Up To 50')
Description: Install new 15amp or 20amp circuit up to 50' away from panel. Includes breaker, wire, box, duplex receptacle and labor to run new circuit and install box and receptacle.

Name: Install New 220v 30a Circuit (Up To 10')
Description: Install new 30amp 220v circuit up to 10' away from panel. Includes breaker, wire, box, duplex receptacle and labor to run new circuit and install box and receptacle.

Name: Install New 220v 50a Circuit (Next To Panel)
Description: Install new 50amp 220v circuit from panel to new location. Includes breaker, wire, box, duplex receptacle and labor to run new circuit and install box and receptacle.

Name: Install New Aftermarket Fan/Light Remote
Description: Installed a new aftermarket wall switch control for your ceiling fan, providing convenient wireless operation and improved control over fan speed and lighting. This upgrade enhances comfort, accessibility, and ease of use for your home environment and designed to give you separate fan/ light control without upgrading your home wiring.

Name: Install New Camera
Description: Remove all mounting hardware from provided camera box and install on code compliant mount or box. Install all required connection and weatherproofing. Install camera on new hardware and arm camera and lights in general proposed location. Check power to unit after install. Camera furnished by owner.

Name: Install New CT Meter Bank (Up To 12)
Description: Remove old existing meter sockets. Install new meter bank and run new CT's and wire for individual meters. Includes meter bank with up to 12 meter sockets. Meter bank, CT's, and wire FBO (furnished by owner)

Name: Install New Doorbell Transformer
Description: Test wiring at doorbell to check for voltage. Locate existing doorbell transformer. Turn circuit off at breaker panel. Remove existing transformer. Install new transformer, turn circuit on and check for proper voltage after repair

Name: Install New LED Slim Can Light (No Access)
Description: Installing new light fixture in new location. Includes running up to 15' of wire to add to existing lighting switchleg. Includes 6 LED slim can light.

Name: Install New LED Slim Can Light (Open Access)
Description: Installing new light fixture in new location. Includes running up to 15' of wire to add to existing lighting switchleg. Includes 6 LED slim can light.

Name: Install New Low Voltage Landscape Lights (Includes Light)
Description: Provide and install new landscape light. Run new wire from transformer or other light up to 30' away. Does not include boring under sidewalk or trenching in grass. Includes in flower bed only. Select color temp on light and aim on house or landscaping

Name: Install New Low Voltage Landscape Transformer
Description: Find existing power outside for transformer. Drill in siding or brick and install anchors for mounting. Mount transformer on wall near existing power. Install power cord from existing power to new transformer. Terminate all low voltage and line voltage wires. Test operation after install.

Name: Install New Photocell
Description: Find existing lighting circuit and box and verify photocell mounting. Change out box if necessary. Install new 1,000w swivel mount photocell. Connect hot and switchleg to existing lighting circuit. Load test circuit to verify circuit load is under required wattage. Check for correct operation after install.

Name: Install New Ring Camera
Description: Remove all mounting hardware from Ring camera box and install on code compliant box. Install all required connections and weatherproofing. Install camera on new hardware and aim camera and lights in general proposed location. Check power to unit after install. Ring unit furnished by owner.

Name: Install Old Work Fixture Box
Description: Locate and mark location of new box. Cut Sheetrock out to fit round cut-in box. Install new round cut-in box and install cable in box with clamps. Secure box to wall with Sheetrock clamps. Verify secure mounting.

Name: Install Pool Light
Description: Company to provide new LED enclosed 6” or 10” submergible fixture. Technician to get in pool, remove screws holding light in place in niche. Locate j-box where fixture whip is terminated, remove cover, disconnect and tie string onto SO whip. Pull submerged fixture out from niche and pull whip through conduit bringing pull string in its place. Tie new fixture while to string and pull new whip into conduit and into j box. Includes up to 100’ whip. Make all necessary terminations, install fixture in niche and test for correct operation.

Name: Install Remodel Fan Box
Description: Remove existing plastic box from ceiling. Remove romex from plastic box. Install new remodel adjustable metal bracket fan rated box in ceiling and line up with existing hole in ceiling. Secure to trusses.

Name: Install RGB Low Voltage Landscape Lights
Description: Install new 300w smart transformer, install 14/2 direct burial landscape wire, install stakes for new lights. Install lights in stakes and connect to main trunk line for power with weather proof connectors. Turn on and check correct operation. All components supplied by contractor and includes up to 6 lights and up to 200' of wire

Name: Install RGB Pool Light
Description: Company to provide new LED RGB enclosed 6” or 10” submergible fixture. Technician to get in pool, remove screws holding light in place in niche. Locate j-box where fixture whip is terminated, remove cover, disconnect and tie string onto SO whip. Pull submerged fixture out from niche and pull whip through conduit bringing pull string in its place. Tie new fixture while to string and pull new whip into conduit and into j box. Includes up to 100’ whip. Make all necessary terminations for controller and power, install fixture in niche and test for correct operation.

Name: Install Smart Switch
Description: Removing existing single pole switch and cover plate. Remove wiring. Check for existing neutral connection. Install new single pole smart switch and terminate all wires including new neutral termination. Re-install and install cover plate. Check for correct operation. Does not include set-up

Name: Install TV Back Lights
Description: Provide and install up to 16’ of tv back lights. Includes smart hub to control RGB lights from phone or smart hub.

Name: Install Under Cabinet Light
Description: Provide and install new LED CCT under cabinet light fixture. Wiring for fixtures already at location and ready for termination. Verify power at location is correct operation. Install fixture centered in opening and terminate cable. Verify correct operation. Includes 1, LED, CCT, dimmable, direct wire, slim construction, 12 to 36 fixture.

Name: Install Wireless 3-Way
Description: Install master switch in original switch location. Install new slave switch in new location for wireless switching. Includes smart switch to connect to smart home system. Check correct operation.

Name: Make Safe
Description: Remove old fixture or device, cap off wires, and install blank cover if necessary to make safe for continued use

Name: Provide and Install Bulb
Description: Provide and install new LED integrated E26 base 60 watt bulb for owner provided fixture.

Name: Quad Receptacle
Description: Remove existing single gang box with single device, install 2 gang box and 2 new devices. Install cover plate.

Name: Remove EV Level 2 Charger
Description: Locate and open the EV charger breaker in the main electrical panel to disconnect power. Identify if the charger is had-wired or cord and plug style. Remove load wires from charger or unplug from 14-50R. Follow charger instructions to remove from wall. Cap wires off inside hardwire box if applicable and install blank plate.

Name: Repair Light Fixture
Description: Inspection damaged light fixture housing. Remove cover or bulb and inspect terminations. Determine if repair is possible. Repair broken wire, remove broken bulb, or repair connections. Re-install and check for correct operation.

Name: Repair Sheetrock Holes
Description: Subcontract sheetrock company to come in and patch sheetrock hole 4x4. Paint provided by homeowner.

Name: Replace 2-pole Breaker
Description: Replace non-working 2-pole breaker with new 2-pole breaker up to 60 amps. (does not include GFCI/AFCI breakers)

Name: Replace Breaker
Description: Replace non-working single pole breaker with new breaker up to 30 amps. (does not include GFCI/AFCI breakers)

Name: Replace Chandelier (10’-15’)
Description: Remove old light fixture, install new customer provided chandelier. Includes installing all bulbs. Does not include installing crystals or add-ons. Before install, verify ceiling box is rated for chandelier weight.

Name: Replace Chandelier (15’- 19’)
Description: Remove old light fixture, install new customer provided chandelier. Includes installing all bulbs. Does not include installing crystals or add-ons. Before install, verify ceiling box is rated for chandelier weight.

Name: Replace Chandelier (over 16')
Description: Remove old light fixture, install new customer provided chandelier. Includes installing all bulbs. Does not include installing crystals or add-ons. Before install, verify ceiling box is rated for chandelier weight.

Name: Replace CT Meter
Description: Remove old existing CT and meter socket. Install new meter socket and new meter. Run new wires for CT and install new CT's on existing feeder wires. Meter socket, meter, CT's, and wire FBO (furnished by owner)

Name: Replace Exhaust Fan
Description: Verify power to existing exhaust fan and number of switchlegs. Turn off power and remove existing exhaust fan cover plate. Disconnect all wiring. Remove exhaust fan housing and vent. Cut opening in sheetrock to correct size for new exhaust fan housing. Install vent into housing, install cable into electrical box on housing and mount housing on ceiling to ceiling joists. If no vent duct present, customer will be advised of price to add vent ducting. Terminate all wiring on exhaust fan motor terminals. Install exhaust fan motor and light assembly (if included) and install cover plate. Restore power and check for correct operation

Name: Replace Light Fixture (Company Provided Fixture
Description: Remove existing light fixture. Install new company provided fixture. Test for correct operation after repair. Does not include fixture. Home owner has option of picking fixture out and fixture will be added to material list.

Name: Replace Light Fixture (Owner Provided)
Description: Removal of old fixture and installation of new owner purchased light fixture.

Name: Replace Recessed Lighting With Slim Downlights
Description: Remove and replace old recessed light fixture and install new LED wafer light (retrofit or pop-in). Includes LED fixture and labor to install fixture.

Name: Replace Smoke Detector (Up To 12')
Description: Remove existing smoke detector and install new smoke detector with 10 year battery. Check for correct operation and alarm function after install.

Name: Replace Smoke/ Carbon Monoxide Detector (Up To 12')
Description: Remove existing smoke/carbon monoxide detector and install new smoke detector with 10 year battery. Check for correct operation and alarm function after install.

Name: Replace Switch / Receptacle
Description: Remove current switch and/or receptacle and replace with new switch/ receptacle and face plate. Does not include dimmers.

Name: Saw Cut Concrete, per ft
Description: Hire subcontractor to saw cut concrete sub floor. If finished floor is installed, it is to be removed before we start cutting. If needed, install plastic around work area to contain dust. Subcontractor to saw cut concrete at 2”Wx 4”H or specified dimensions. After conduit is laid and stub-ups are complete, subcontractor is to return, pour same pressure concrete and color match. Subcontractor to finish new poured concrete.

Name: Secure Device In Wall
Description: Remove cover plate from device. Inspect device for proper wire termination and installation. Correct wire terminations, install spacers if needed, and tighten device down to box to be flush with wall. Replace cover plate if required. Test for correct operation after repair

Name: Security Camera/NVR package
Description: Installation and material for installing 4 camera security system in desired locations of residence.

Name: Smart door bell installation
Description: Removal of existing door bell, check condition of low voltage wire, check voltage from transformer, install customer provided smart doorbell.

Name: Smart Thermostat Install - Google Nest
Description: Furnish and install Google Nest smart thermostat at existing location. Includes thermostat replacement, device setup, Wi-Fi/app connection, programming, testing, and verification of proper operation.

Name: Spa Circuit
Description: Determine the size of circuit needed for spa. Run romex to location, install breaker, install 50a spa disconnect near location for spa.

Name: Terminate Existing Appliance (under 40A)
Description: Appliance to be installed and ready for termination upon arrival. Check exiting circuit and verify power is off. Verify appliance max amperage and existing circuit amperage. Install junction box with proper connectors. Secure line and load conduits or wires into junction box. Terminate wiring as indicated in manual. Install blank cover on junction box. Energize circuit and test for correct operation.

Name: Terminate Existing Power Run
Description: NXG provided conduit run and wiring to panel and location of receptacle, receptacles, covers and breakers. Install and terminate receptacles and install and terminate breaker.

Name: Travel and Board
Description: -  Single mobilization from DFW to ??? with a two-person Grizzly crew

Name: Whole Home Surge Protector
Description: Install whole home surge protector in electrical panel. Includes surge protector, trim ring, and $75,000 connected appliance warranty. This surge protector provides protection against power surges from the power company, dirty power and acts as a lightning arrestor. Protection from 200,000 amps max.

Name: Whole Hone Energy Monitor
Description: SENSE SAVES: Sense saves you energy and money by providing insights into your home's energy use and activity. NOW SUPPORTING TIME-OF-USE RATE PLANS.

Name: Full Home Electrical Inspection w/ Inspection Report
Description: Perform full inspection on home electrical system. Inspect overhead or underground service providing the home electrical. Inspect grounding and bonding system. Remove panel cover and check panel condition and breaker condition and functionality. Inspect GFCI, smoke detectors, light operation, AC whips and appliance whips and all items pertaining to electrical system. Included is an in-depth inspection report complete with pictures and comments with pictures.

Name: Permits and Inspections
Description: All required permits for the governing city. Green tag/ pass of all inspections required by city for work being performed.

Name: Install Electric Car Charger
Description: Remove panel cover and check for open circuits in panel for EV charger. Install new 2 pole 50a breaker and #6 awg non-metallic cable from panel to new charger location in next stud cavity over from panel. Install new box and secure box and cable. install new owner provided EV charger and turn circuit on. Check for proper operation after repair.

Name: Install Fan
Description: Remove existing fan. Check wiring and fan rated box installed correctly. Build new fan provided by owner and hang new bracket. Hang new fan and terminate all wiring. Install beauty ring and check for proper operation after repair.

Name: Install Ground Wire
Description: Install ground wire

Name: Install Light Fixtures
Description: Remove existing ceiling fixture. Check wiring and box mounting for proper installation. Install new owner provided light fixture and check for proper operation

Name: Install Outdoor Lighting
Description: Find location of existing low voltage outdoor transformer. Check wiring from transformer to light fixture. If wiring is ok, remove existing low voltage landscape light and install new fixture. Terminate wires with outdoor rated terminations. Check for proper operation after repair.

Name: Install Outlets or Switches
Description: Remove existing cover plate and device. Match new device with existing color and style. Install new single pole switch or receptacle. Install new cover plate. Check for correct operation after repair.

Name: Install Security System
Description: Install security system

Name: Other
Description: Other

Name: Relocate Outlets or Switches
Description: Notate location of old device. Run up to 15' of cable to new location. Install new box, secure box and cable, and install new device. Install blank cover on old box location for safety. Check for proper operation after repair.

Name: Remodeling
Description: Remodeling

Name: Repair Fan
Description: Check fan operation. Remove light kit or beauty ring and determine repair necessary. Install new chain pull or re-terminate wiring. Check for correct operation after repair.

Name: Repair Light Fixtures
Description: Inspect broken light fixture. Check for damage to lens, housing, and wiring. Repair fixture if repair is possible. After repair, check for proper operation.

Name: Repair Outlets or Switches
Description: Remove cover plate. Remove existing device and inspect for damage. If damage is found, recommend replacement or repair if possible. Install wires correctly on device and re-install device after repair is made. Check for correct operation after repair.

Name: Repair Panel
Description: Panel rejuvenation includes removing wires from breakers and ground/neutral bars, straightening and organizing wires, marking any ungrounded conductors to proper marking, check breaker sizes and confirm correct installation of breakers, check service feeders and terminations, check grounding bushings, re-install all wires on breakers and torque to proper specifications, check for proper operation and close panel cover.

Name: Replace or Upgrade Panel
Description: Replace or upgrade panel

Name: Restore Power
Description: Restore power

Name: 15/20a Home Runs (Up To 150')
Description: Determine the size circuit needed for appliance or branch circuit. Lighting circuits to be 15a arc fault protected per NEC. General purpose receptacles, kitchen circuits and outdoor circuits to be 20a circuits. Provide GFCI protection for all necessary areas per NEC. Run new Romex cabling from new panel location to desired first location for said circuit. Strap and support according to local and national code (NEC). Install home runs in specified boxes and label cabling coming in.

Name: Remove Aluminum Wiring
Description: Locating existing aluminum home run, set box in attic and connect with copper to aluminum connections with new copper n/m romex wire. Remove all existing aluminum wire associated with home run, re run all wire with new copper n/m romex

Name: Change 2-Gang To 3-Gang Box And Add Switchleg
Description: Remove existing 2 switches from 2 gang box. Remove 2 gang box and install new switchleg to box. Install new 3 gang box, install 2 old switches and install new switch. Install cover plate.

Name: Change Single-Gang To 2-Gang Box And Add Switchleg
Description: Remove existing 1 switch from single gang box. Remove single gang box and install new switchleg to box. Install new 2 gang box, install 1 old switch and install new switch. Install cover plate.

Name: Change Toggle 3-Way Switch To Decora 3-Way (1-10)
Description: Remove existing cover plate. Remove existing switch and mark common and 2 traveler wires in box. Inspect box and wire conditions. Verify box threads are in good condition. Terminate existing travelers and common wire to new switch. Install switch into box and install new cover plate. Check for correct operation after repair.

Name: Change Toggle 3-Way Switch To Decora 3-Way Switch (11+ Items)
Description: Remove existing cover plate. Remove existing switch and mark common and 2 traveler wires in box. Inspect box and wire conditions. Verify box threads are in good condition. Terminate existing travelers and common wire to new switch. Install switch into box and install new cover plate. Check for correct operation after repair.

Name: Change Toggle Device To Decora Device (1-10)
Description: Remove existing cover plate. Remove existing device in wall and check all wiring in box. Verify box is in good working condition and all device securement threads in box are in working order. Terminate new wiring on new device. Install new device in wall and install new cover plate. Check for correct operation after repair.

Name: Change Toggle Device To Decora Device (11-40)
Description: Remove existing cover plate. Remove existing device in wall and check all wiring in box. Verify box is in good working condition and all device securement threads in box are in working order. Terminate new wiring on new device. Install new device in wall and install new cover plate. Check for correct operation after repair.

Name: Change Toggle Device To Decora Device (41+ Items)
Description: Remove existing cover plate. Remove existing device in wall and check all wiring in box. Verify box is in good working condition and all device securement threads in box are in working order. Terminate new wiring on new device. Install new device in wall and install new cover plate. Check for correct operation after repair.

Name: Install 2-Gang Device Cover
Description: After changing devices from standard style to decora devices, Install jumpers from device to other device(s) in box and provide and install 2 gang nylon white cover plate.

Name: Install 3 Gang Decora Cover
Description: After changing devices from standard style to decora devices, Install jumpers from device to other device(s) in box and provide and install 3 gang nylon white cover plate.

Name: Install 3-Way Switch
Description: A 3-way switch installation allows you to control a single light or fixture from two different locations, adding convenience and flexibility to your space. It’s perfect for stairways, hallways, or large rooms, improving safety and accessibility. Install 3-way switch in location determined by prints or customer request if no prints available.

Name: Install 4 Gang Decora Cover
Description: After changing devices from standard style to decora devices, Install jumpers from device to other device(s) in box and provide and install 4 gang nylon white cover plate.

Name: Install GFCI
Description: Protect your home and loved ones by installing a GFCI (Ground Fault Circuit Interrupter) outlet. GFCIs help prevent electrical shocks in areas exposed to moisture, like kitchens and bathrooms, enhancing safety and meeting code requirements.

Name: Install Switch and Exhaust Fan
Description: Install new switch and run up to 15' of 3 wire romex to new exhaust fan location. Install exhaust fan and terminate all wiring.

Name: Install Switch and Fan Rated Box
Description: Install switchleg from switch to center of room for fan. Install fan rated box and securely fasten to trusses. Includes up to 15' of romex and secured properly

Name: Install Ultra Slim Downlight
Description: Install jumpers between fixtures and daisy chain fixtures together on same switchleg. Measure and leave whip for future fixture and staple in place. Staple and secure all romex to studs. Provide and install slim LED can light.

Name: Move Receptacle To Countertop Height
Description: Locate existing receptacle noted to be moved up to countertop height. Remove box from wall and wiring from box. Mark new height on stud and mount new box on mark. Re-route line side cable to new box location. install load side cable into box and if  necessary, run new cable if old cable does not reach due to height change.

Name: New Switchleg and Cannless Downlights
Description: Run new switchleg from existing switchbox to first lighting location less than 15' from switch. Install jumpers between fixtures and daisy chain fixtures together on same switchleg. Measure and leave whip for future fixture and staple in place. Staple and secure all romex to studs.

Name: Recenter can light in room
Description: Remove exsisting can housing and wire. Set j box if needed. Install new light fixture, wire with any other lights in room if necessary

Name: Relocate 1-2 Gang Switchbox (Up To 20')
Description: After wall removal, locate hanging switchbox from cabling. Trace homerun feeding switchbox and trace and locate any other outlets receiving power from switchbox. Label and remove all wiring from switchbox and re-route homerun to new switchbox location. Run up to 2 new switchleg cables to first light in switchleg. Run and route any other cables feeding downstream outlets.

Name: Relocate 3-4 Gang Switchbox (Up To 20')
Description: After wall removal, locate hanging switchbox from cabling. Trace homerun feeding switchbox and trace and locate any other outlets receiving power from switchbox. Label and remove all wiring from switchbox and re-route homerun to new switchbox location. Run up to 4 new switchleg cables to first light in switchleg. Run and route any other cables feeding downstream outlets.

Name: Relocate Receptacle Box (Up To 20')
Description: After wall is removed, locate outlet box and home run feeding outlet box. Trace and locate any other outlet boxes being fed from relocating box. Remove all wiring from old box, re-route and re run cable to new location. Run new cable from new location to other boxes if needed to continue power.

Name: Replace Device box
Description: Removal of existing nail on box, install new cut in box, rewire new device to operate properly.

Name: Residential Rough-in (Per Sq/Ft)
Description: Walls down to studs and sheetrock removed from all locations needing new wiring. Check prints and mark out all locations for receptacles, switches, GFCI’s, home runs, fixtures and appliances. Determine where home runs will be located and at what devices they will start. Determine appliance power requirements and install boxes and wire accordingly. If power requirements not noted, the industry standard shall be used at electricians discretion. Install boxes at specified height (check with GC prior to install. Run new cabling to all new boxes. Secure and strap all cables according to local and national code (NEC). Label and strip all cables in boxes and make all equipment grounding conductors. If boxless recessed down lights are to be used, install all drivers (provided by owner) and make up all equipment grounding conductors.

Name: Residential Trim-out (Per Sq/Ft)
Description: After all rough inspections are complete, paint, tile and final installs are complete, electricians to come in to finish out electrical work. All device styles to be standard/toggle style unless otherwise noted. Install all new devices. Make up all equipment grounding conductors to device yokes. Install devices in boxes, flush with final wall. Use if caterpillars or spacers may be required to obtain desired flush install. Install GFCI’s where accessible. Dimmer switches may be added if noted prior to trim-out phase. Install all new cover plates. Cover plates to be white in color unless otherwise noted. Determine all switch legs are in correct locations and cut in all lighting boxes. Install all fixtures and installing equipment grounding conductors to all metal fixtures and mounts. Install owner provided bulbs where necessary. Install all outdoor bubble covers and disconnects for appliances. Install any appliance whips and terminate appliances. Final walk through to determine job is complete and ready for final inspection.

Name: Annual Maintenance Check
Description: Fluid and filter replacement: Replace the engine oil, oil filter, and air filter, often using Generac-approved synthetic oil.

Name: Generator Inlet With Interlock
Description: Install new generator inlet within 10' of existing electrical panel. Install new 2-pole 50a breaker, interlock/ lock-out system, conduit from panel to inlet, #6 AWG wire from panel to inlet, and also all necessary material to comply with local and national electrical code. Includes brief walk-through, after install, to go over correct and safe operation of generator.

Name: Generator Quick Connect Gas Line (Over 15'), per ft
Description: Sub contract certified plumber to install new “T” on existing gas meter. Run hard line along wall or bury underground and install new quick connect fittings in end of run. All installed to city and national code. Minimum 16'

Name: Generator Quick Connect Gas Line (Under 15'), per ft
Description: Sub contract certified plumber to install new “T” on existing gas meter. Run hard line along wall or bury underground and install new quick connect fittings in end of run. All installed to city and national code. Minimum 5' to maximum 15'

Name: Install Generator and ATS
Description: Determine location that generator will sit on property bearing in mind city code, NEC code and noise restrictions. After determining best location for generator, install generator pad and level. Set generator on new leveled pad and secure to ground. Run liquid-tite flexible conduit out of generator and to service location on house. Remove wiring from existing meter base and panel board. Install new ATS on wall next to electrical meter. Install conduits between ATS, meter and panel board. Run new 2/0 CU feeders to all 3. Make terminations and torque to specification. Secure, strap and bond all necessary components and conduits. Terminate AC lock outs if needed. Test for proper function after install. Schedule for city inspection and receive green tag after all work and inspections are complete. (Price is for up to 20' from ATS to Gnerator)

Name: Solar and Battery Pack Install
Description: Install battery packs. Connect battery packs with parallel expansion cable. Install 30a inlet with 30a inlet cable. Build solar rack and secure solar panels to rack. Run solar cables from panels to battery packs and bury underground. Initiate battery packs and check for proper charging and output.

Name: Solar Panels and Battery Packs (240v 3600W)
Description: 2- HomePower 3600 Plus Solar Generators

Name: Install 1 or 2 Port Jack Plate
Description: Cut in new hole in desired location. Install Ethernet cable in hole and install data ring. Terminate cable ends on jacks and install in jack plate. Secure jack plate to data ring.

Name: Install HDMI Concealed In Wall For TV
Description: Provide high speed 15’ HDMI cable. Feed wire from ground level brush plate, through the wall and out brush plate behind TV. Install any cover plates and check connection.

Name: Install New DSC Alarm System
Description: Remove all existing alarm components including but not limited to- door switches, door sensors, motion detectors, sirens, glass break sensors, keypads and control modules. Install new controller in MDF. Install new door sensors in front and rear door (If existing door sensors are compatible with new system, company will re-use door sensors). Install new glass break sensors (x2- customer to determine which windows). Install new motion detectors. Install new keypad at customers desired location. Install new alarm siren. All programming to be configured at time of install. Check for correct operation after configuration. Customer to accept or decline 24/7 monitoring ($30/mo). All installs and configuration to be completed by licensed alarm technicians.

Name: Install New Network Switch
Description: Label all cables terminating at existing network switch. Test cable on both ends to verify function. Remove cables from network switch and remove power adapter. Install new power adapter, install existing cables into matching ports on new network switch. Turn on network switch and test functionality of all internet runs. Includes new 8-port gigabit network switch with lifetime warranty.

Name: Run New CAT5 Line
Description: Install CAT6 cable in attic. Run new cable from router to new location no further than 50' from router. Install new low voltage box and install cable in box and terminate on tombstone connector. Install new cover plate with connector and test connection.

Name: Run New CAT6 Line
Description: Install CAT6 cable in attic. Run new cable from router to new location no further than 50' from router. Install new low voltage box and install cable in box and terminate on tombstone connector. Install new cover plate with connector and test connection.

Name: Terminate RJ-45 Ends (CAT8)
Description: Strip back insulation of CAT8 4 pair shielded cable assembly. Align pairs and insert into RJ-45 connector. Crimp connector and test connection. Wire test assembly passes as GOOD, can proceed with install. CAT8 RJ-45's furnished by company.

The flood beam angle is perfect for highlighting wide areas, as well as enhancing home security. The LED system provides maintenance free operation and there are no bulbs to change. With cast aluminum construction, long life powder coat finish and weatherproof electronics, you can count on many years of service.

Name: Low-Voltage 300 Watt Landscape Transformer
Description: The landscape transformers are Hampton Bay's lowest profile slim line power units which can be easily concealed after installation. These units are based on a potted toroidal core design that eliminates annoying buzzing sounds while offering the highest efficiency possible. Our Hampton Bay SL units meet the Department of Energy DOE mandatory requirement efficiency rating of VI. Utilizing state of the art sensing circuits our transformers provide dual safety functions that detect and react to a system overloaded or a short circuit condition in a landscape installation. Hampton Bay power packs provide convenient features and flexibility to design simple or more elaborate landscape lighting designs. The transformer includes a photocell and digital timer, a ground shield making it safe for use with submersible lights. The units are equipped with dual voltage output terminals (12-Volt and 15-Volt) which help compensate for voltage drops in high-Wattage / longer wire runs as well as to help reduce cable loss when using 15-Volt LED fixtures.
